details.test: Task 1: Start enrollment for full-day weekday program with extended hours
Task 2: Schedule center tour on first available (Tuesday-like) date next month
Task 3: Choose classroom by lowest ratio and submit inquiry
Task 4: Compare tuition and start enrollment for cheapest eligible plan
Task 5: Register interest for program with Lincoln Elementary pickup (adapted)
Task 6: Specify vegetarian & nut-free needs from Wednesday menu
Task 7: RSVP to age-appropriate event after 3 PM in next 30 days
Task 8: Ask question about December holiday closures via contact form
Task 9: Subscribe to newsletter and adjust preferences without SMS
